question: What does the document explain in the section 'What it measures' about measures spontaneous behavior prosodic?
expected_answer: ## What it measures Some papers move beyond naturalness and measure whether the model can generate: - varied prosody, - emotionally appropriate speech, - spontaneous or conversational behavior, - style-appropriate delivery. The LREC 2024 Bark evaluation studies five dimensions: - speaking style, - intelligibility, - speaker consistency, - prosodic variation, - spontaneous behavior.

question: What does the document explain in the section 'How it is done' about audio accuracy done generate?
expected_answer: Run a strong ASR system on the audio. Compare the ASR transcript with the intended text.
source_preview: ## How it is done 1. Generate audio from TTS. 2. Run a strong ASR system on the audio. 3. Compare the ASR transcript with the intended text. 4. Compute WER. The LREC 2024 Bark evaluation explicitly uses WER as a proxy for intelligibility, citing prior work that ASR accuracy correlates with human transcription accuracy. The EmergentTTS-Eval paper also identifies WER as one of the standard automatic TTS metrics.
